title: c sides (2)
body:
- ))}}
    - what did i do to em
what did i do to em
what if i do it again
god damn
i thought i knew us
but nothing seems cool to them anymore
did they misconstrue when
i went in hard instead of shooting
i didn't expect em take that charge
i wasn't winning
ive been in a scrimmage
when did the stakes enlarge
i've always played games
my favorites have limits
written right on the cards
the worst build a box
make you pay for spots
that say who you are
and how you fit in it
i'm not an image
i'm not a digit
i am infinite and imaginative
it is the reason my reason reaches
to kindle the colors the crush of life leeches
we get old fast looking for beaches unsures of uncertainty
i am not drifting i have been surfing seas
the moment
see the crease in the curtain and open it even though i'm nervous
whatever's there i own it
so i don't burn circuits workin for purchase
i idle cycles
and karma always waves back
that's my kinda hai
coo with the chaos that comes from my cracks
cuz my greatest strength has always been being
i am a fact
you are a fact
the room is too small to not deal with that
life is too short to get stuck on the fiction
that picking a path puts you past all the friction
if that's plan you have with the thought that you've given
i can't recommend sitting enough
take time to listen
from the first needle drop
til the record start skippin
and that's when you flip it
besides
how else will you deal with your gifts
how much presence you maintain each time you push a single
across the table trying to trade for relief
how much are you able to pay for belief
i gotta bridge to sell you
and i'll tell you right now
it goes nowhere
but it's home to a much realer crowd
than the ones that don't go there
that's why i'm so fucking loud
about how i love to play shows there
crowing cuz i'm proud of the people i know there
wake up in the morning, ten toes, and i'm at it
dougie, freshen up for six minutes and st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] clappin
skip the mirror cuz i see clearer when i imagine what i look like
it's a new world every time i'm rapping
my way through everything that happens
shout out to slick rick for taking us on that trip
and that's it
- ))}}
    - ))}}
        - [stream c sides by billy | listen online for free on soundcloud](https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/c-sides)
